description_long: This is a narrow, three-story apartment building with a pink stucco facade and a sloped terracotta-tiled roof. The front features three levels of green wooden shutters, some of which are open, and a ground floor with a stone base, a large wooden door, and a smaller window or shopfront. The sides and rear of the building show patches of worn plaster revealing stonework beneath, giving it a weathered, aged appearance. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front, while the sides and back are mostly solid with minimal openings. The building sits on a tiled base, suggesting an urban sidewalk or plaza setting. The overall style and materials evoke Mediterranean or Southern European residential architecture.
description: A narrow, pink stucco apartment building with a sloped terracotta roof, green shutters, and a stone base, showing signs of weathering and age.
description_view_0: Front view showing three floors with green shutters, a stone base, a large wooden door, and a ground-level window.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the sloped roof, worn plaster patches, and a mostly solid wall with no windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain pink wall, visible weathered plaster, and a stone base, lacking windows or doors.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a sloped roof, worn plaster, and no windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical pairs on the front facade, with each floor having two evenly spaced windows. The sides and rear have no windows.
